quoteFirst: "'One night, two or three years ago, I came back from the      theatre to my mother's flat at 6 S---- Street; and after I had      been into her bedroom and told her all about it, I went to bed
quoteLast: I had not been asleep long when I started up      frightened, fancying that I had heard someone walk down the      passage towards my mother's room; but, hearing nothing more,      went to sleep again. I started up alarmed in the same way three      or four times before dawn.
